title: New Skin on the Drawing Board
content:
I didn't mention that my lovely TBox (started from a non-sense diary) has reached the 1-year milestone last week. Well, there's nothing significant so I didn't mention it. Anyway, the domain (macsf.net) will be a year old next month so I guess I need to do something. (anybody will get a cake? eieieie) ...

Hopefully, it will be done by next month (exactly a month from now). :P Actually, before I get to that - I have to make sure that I pay for the domain renewal! Heheheheh ...
